name: Graph Storage
summary: File system operations for reading and writing spec data. Manages manifest files, specs data (graph, list, document), architect data, and history archives. Supports project-level and user-level storage locations.
goals: Read and write manifest, specs, and architect data as JSON files
Support project-level (.harnesson/) and user-level storage locations
Archive previous sync data with timestamped history entries
Resolve storage locations based on project configuration

acceptanceCriteria.given: A project with a valid storage path
acceptanceCriteria.then: the data is persisted as JSON files in the correct directory
previous data is archived with a timestamp

end-to-end.when: graph data is read after a sync
end-to-end.then: the data matches what was written by the sync process

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: feat(sync-specs): add auto-detection status rules in Step 5 user review
